Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»JUST IN: Wayde van Niekerk reaches 200m semi-finals

Wayde van Niekerk reached the semi-finals of the men’s 200m at the Paris Olympics 2024 on Monday evening, but it wasn’t plain sailing …

Wayde van Niekerkreached the semi-finals of the men’s200mat theParis Olympics 2024on Monday evening.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

However, it wasn’t plain sailing for the star South African track star.

Van Niekerk finished third in his heat in a pedestrian20.42.

That time wound up being theslowesttime recorded by the 18 athletes who automatically qualified for the semi-finals.

Meanwhile,Shaun Maswanganialso finished third in his heat, but in a quicker20.20to also reach the semi-final stage.

However, there was heartbreak for South Africa’s third entrantBenjamin Richardsonwho appeared to pull a hamstring in his heat and limped across the line in last place in51.86.

The semi-finals will take place onWednesday, 7 Augustfrom20:02(SA time).

South Africa started Monday with four medals with Tatjana Smith (gold and silver) and the men’s sevens rugby and Alan Hatherly (bronze) putting them in a tie for 29th place on the overall table.
